description: Managed day-to-day operations for the My Honda+ app across European markets. Built the Datadog monitoring platform from an underutilised state—log parsing, dashboards, alerting with Teams integration. Led an API development project end-to-end with IBM developers for regulatory compliance. Handled P1 critical incidents, coordinating resolution bridges with suppliers. Fixed a multi-year app issue affecting 1000+ weekly users. Organised the 2025 undergraduate assessment centre (4.85/5 satisfaction). First point of contact for vendor communications across IBM, AT&T, and Bosch.

Led a committee of 30+ members through COVID-19 and political crisis in Myanmar. Designed virtual exchange programmes connecting 100+ Myanmar youth with international students when in-person wasn't possible. Organised public events with 100+ attendees. Achieved "Activating Leadership" award for 2021. Also served as Entity Development Manager for AIESEC Myanmar, managing projects across 5 regional teams and delivering training sessions to groups of up to 50 members.
Liaising between international students, academic staff, and the student union to make sure the challenges we face get heard and addressed. Faculty of Environment and Science representative.
Customer service in a busy restaurant while balancing full-time studies. Trained new team members on service standards and POS systems. Best Part-time Staff Q4 2022.
